label: Passport
whyItMatters: Often needed for identity checks across relocation and settlement steps.
whoToContact: Passport office or civil authority in your country of citizenship.
costNote: Fees vary by issuing country and whether renewal is expedited.

label: Passport copies (digital and printed)
whyItMatters: Copies help with repeated onboarding requests and reduce friction.
whereToGetIt: Create clear scans and printed copies from your valid passport.
whoToContact: Copy/print service if needed for certified copies.
costNote: Copy and certification costs vary by provider.

label: Residence permit documentation awareness
whyItMatters: Understanding relevant permit documentation avoids uncertainty later.
whereToGetIt: Official immigration information channels and your formal paperwork trail.
whoToContact: Employer HR, relocation advisor, or official immigration contact points.
costNote: Any formal application fees depend on your route and circumstances.

label: Employment contract
whyItMatters: Commonly used to confirm job details in relocation-related processes.
whereToGetIt: From your employer or hiring entity.
costNote: Usually no direct fee to obtain from employer.

label: Job offer letter
whyItMatters: Can support early-stage planning before full onboarding is complete.

label: Employer contact details
whyItMatters: Clear contacts help resolve document requests quickly.
whereToGetIt: From your offer packet or onboarding email trail.
costNote: No direct fee; only time and coordination.

label: Sponsorship or work authorization documentation awareness
whyItMatters: Awareness helps avoid missing paperwork in work-based relocation routes.
whereToGetIt: Through employer communications and official route information.
whoToContact: Employer HR, relocation support, or authorized advisors.
costNote: Fees and processing costs depend on route and jurisdiction.

label: Rental agreement or housing contract
whyItMatters: Often used to support address-based admin and provider setup.
whereToGetIt: From landlord, rental agency, or housing provider.
whoToContact: Landlord, letting agent, or housing platform support.
costNote: Document itself is usually provided; related deposits/fees vary by rental.

label: Address confirmation document
whyItMatters: Address confirmation is commonly requested across early settlement steps.
whereToGetIt: From your housing provider or formal housing documentation trail.
whoToContact: Landlord, agency, or housing admin support.
costNote: Costs vary if certified extracts or additional documents are requested.

label: Landlord or agency contact details
whyItMatters: Fast contact access helps resolve document and address questions quickly.
whereToGetIt: From your lease documents and booking communications.
whoToContact: Assigned property manager or agency support.

label: Marriage certificate (if relevant)
whyItMatters: May be requested where partner or family relationships need formal proof.
whereToGetIt: Civil records office in the issuing country.
whoToContact: Local civil registry or certificate issuing authority.
costNote: Issuance and certified copy fees vary by country.

label: Birth certificate (if relevant)
whyItMatters: A core civil record often referenced in family-related paperwork.
whereToGetIt: Civil registry in your country or place of birth.
whoToContact: Vital records office or civil authority.
costNote: Certified extract fees vary by jurisdiction.

label: Children birth certificates
whyItMatters: Family moves commonly require child-specific civil records.
whereToGetIt: Civil registry offices for each child.
whoToContact: Vital records authority in the issuing jurisdiction.
costNote: Fees depend on number of copies and certification requirements.

label: School records awareness
whyItMatters: School transitions often involve additional records and timelines.
whereToGetIt: Current or previous schools and education administration channels.
costNote: Some schools may charge processing or transcript handling fees.

label: Diplomas
whyItMatters: Diplomas can support career continuity and role verification.
whoToContact: University registrar or education records office.
costNote: Replacement and certified copies may involve administrative fees.

label: Academic transcripts
whyItMatters: Transcripts may be helpful for employment or study transitions.
costNote: Transcript request fees vary by institution.

label: Professional certificates
whyItMatters: Professional certifications can support role-specific onboarding conversations.
whereToGetIt: Issuing certification body or training provider.
costNote: Reissue and verification costs differ by credential provider.

label: Travel insurance details
whyItMatters: Insurance details can help cover transition periods and travel changes.
whereToGetIt: From your insurance provider portal or policy pack.
costNote: Policy costs vary by provider, destination period, and coverage level.

label: Relocation booking confirmations
whyItMatters: Booking proofs help coordinate travel, shipping, and arrival logistics.
whereToGetIt: From airline, shipping, and relocation booking portals.
whoToContact: Provider customer support teams for reissue or updates.
costNote: No fee for basic confirmations; amendment costs depend on provider terms.
